title: Multiplex Requirements Schema
description: Schema for multiplex requirements files (multiplex.json) that define parameter presets, validation rules, and unit conversions for a benchmark.  Requirements files constrain and enrich the parameter expansion process.

presets.description: A dictionary of named parameter presets.  Each preset is an array of parameter definitions that can be referenced by sets via 'include-preset'.  Special preset names 'defaults' and 'essentials' are applied automatically.

[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*$.description: An array of parameter definitions belonging to this named preset.

validations.description: A dictionary of validation rules that constrain parameter values.  Each validation specifies which arguments it applies to and what values or patterns are acceptable.

units.description: A dictionary of unit conversion definitions.  Each entry maps a parameter to its unit system, enabling automatic conversion between units (e.g., KB to MB).

mv_param.description: A multivariate parameter definition used within presets.

vals.description: An array of values for this parameter.

role.description: The engine role this parameter applies to.

id.description: An optional numeric identifier for this parameter.

enabled.description: Controls whether this parameter is active.

validation_obj.description: A validation rule that constrains the allowed values for one or more parameter arguments.

args.description: An array of parameter argument names that this validation applies to.

vals.description: The allowed values, specified as either an array of explicit values or a single regex pattern string.

anyOf.description: An array of explicitly allowed values.
A regex pattern that parameter values must match.

description.description: A human-readable description of what this validation rule enforces, shown in error messages when validation fails.

convert.description: A unit key from the 'units' section, indicating that values should be converted to a canonical unit before validation.

transform.description: A regex search-and-replace transformation applied to parameter values before validation.

search.description: The regex pattern to search for in the parameter value.

replace.description: The replacement string for matched patterns.

unit_obj.description: A unit conversion definition mapping unit names to their conversion factors relative to a base unit.

[A-Za-z0-9_-]*$.description: A unit category containing conversion factors.
A conversion factor from this unit to the base unit.
